overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person action game showing a character running through a rainy New Orleans-style city at night. The character crosses streets, runs past a large brick church with Gothic architecture, and continues through a residential neighborhood with classic Southern-style houses while avoiding traffic and passing pedestrians with umbrellas.

events.description: vintage white car drives past as ego prepares to cross
ego runs across the wet road between passing vehicles

agents.ego_description: running across the multi-lane intersection, dodging vintage cars in the rain

vintage pink convertible passing by on the right

white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
traffic sign pole at the corner

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a rainy urban intersection at night, then runs across the wet asphalt between vintage cars. Street lamps cast reflections on the wet road surface as vehicles pass through the intersection.

passing a blue bus stop shelter on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the sidewalk next to the church building

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet sidewalk beside a large historic brick church with Gothic architecture. The camera passes a bus stop shelter and continues alongside the church wall as rain falls steadily.

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through a residential neighborhood with classic Southern-style houses featuring balconies and porches. A white vintage convertible is parked along the wet sidewalk as the church recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with pedestrian crossing and waiting crowd

mailbox on a post near the fence

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection where a group of pedestrians with umbrellas waits at the crosswalk. The character crosses the wet street near the group, passing white picket fences and mailboxes in the residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban environment that shifts from a busy city intersection to a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins with the character sprinting across wet asphalt between vintage cars, where street lamps cast shimmering reflections on the road. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions to a sidewalk run alongside the imposing brick walls of a Gothic church and a lonely bus stop shelter. The environment then opens up into a residential area characterized by classic Southern-style houses with balconies, passing a parked white vintage convertible as the church recedes. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a crosswalk where pedestrians huddle under umbrellas, moving past white picket fences and mailboxes to complete the journey.
